japanese_name: 山本山 お茶ギフトセット
description: Yamamotoyama tea gift set. Tea plus nori in one respectable box, which is very Japan and very airport-safe. Grab it when you need a polite gift that says taste, not panic.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: Yamamotoyama tea gifts, Mitsuboshien tea gifts]

japanese_name: 手ぬぐい
description: Tenugui hand towel. Thin cotton cloth that works as a towel, wrap, headband, or tiny wall art. The souvenir that becomes useful five minutes after buying it.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Kamawanu tenugui, souvenir-shop tenugui, ukiyo-e tenugui]

english_name: King Jim Tepra PRO MARK SR-MK1
japanese_name: キングジム テプラ PRO MARK SR-MK1
description: Tepra label maker. King Jim's tiny label printer for people who want every drawer to confess its contents. Great for renters, planners, and suitcase organization goblins.

japanese_name: キャップ付き携帯はさみ
description: Tiny scissors with cap. Pocket scissors with a blade cover, made for tags, packaging, and emergency hangnail diplomacy. The kind of cheap shop item that saves a whole day.
notes: No reliable image source found; source could not be verified

japanese_name: チロルチョコ バラエティパック
description: Tirol-Choco variety pack. Tiny cube chocolates with a suspiciously large flavor lineup. Buy a bag, pass them around, then watch everyone pick a personality.

japanese_name: 東京ばな奈
description: Tokyo Banana. Soft banana custard cakes in souvenir-box form. The default Tokyo airport panic-buy that actually does its job.

english_name: Tokyo Banana Pikachu Banana Yogurt Flavor
japanese_name: ピカチュウ東京ばな奈 バナナヨーグルト味
description: Tokyo Banana variations. Same soft cake idea, louder outfits and limited flavors. Pikachu, Doraemon, and seasonal boxes turn snack shopping into character roulette.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Pikachu Tokyo Banana, Doraemon Tokyo Banana, maple banana, seasonal Tokyo Banana]

japanese_name: 東京カンパネラ ショコラ
description: Tokyo Campanella. Three-layer langue de chat cookies with a delicate crunch. Tokyo Station gift energy, but less loud than the banana sponge cake aisle.

english_name: Tokyo Milk Cheese Factory Salt and Camembert Cookies
japanese_name: 東京ミルクチーズ工場 ソルト&カマンベールクッキー
description: Tokyo Milk Cheese Factory cookies. Thin cheese-and-milk sandwich cookies with that sweet-salty thing Japan does too well. Buy them when the souvenir needs to look expensive without behaving like luggage.
notes: No reliable image source found; source could not be verified

japanese_name: トンボ鉛筆 筆之助
description: Tombow Fudenosuke Brush Pen. Flexible-tip brush pen for clean Japanese-style lettering and doodles. Cheap enough to buy twice, nice enough to make handwriting feel judged.

japanese_name: トンボ鉛筆 MONO消しゴム
description: Tombow Mono Eraser. The blue-white-black eraser every Japanese desk seems to own. Small, clean, and weirdly satisfying for stationery people.

japanese_name: とらや 小形羊羹
description: Toraya yokan. Dense bean jelly in a polished gift box. Serious wagashi for tea people, grandparents, and anyone immune to cute packaging.
notes: No reliable image source found; source could not be verified

english_name: Traveler's Factory Store-Limited Charms and Refills
japanese_name: トラベラーズファクトリー 店舗限定チャーム・リフィル
description: Traveler's Factory limited charms and refills. Store-only notebook bits for people who treat paper like a lifestyle. Tiny, collectible, and dangerously easy to justify.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: store-limited charms, city refills, brass tags, leather tags]

japanese_name: トラベラーズノート リフィル
description: Traveler's Notebook refill. Slim paper refill for the leather notebook system. The blank one is the safer buy when your travel plans already have enough structure.
notes: No reliable image source found; source could not be verified

japanese_name: TSUBAKI プレミアムリペアマスク
description: Tsubaki Premium Repair Hair Mask. Drugstore hair mask in the gold tub. The quick rinse-off move after Japan humidity turns your hair into a legal dispute.

japanese_name: 漬物パック
description: Tsukemono pickles pack. Crunchy salted pickles for rice, bentos, and late-night fridge grazing. Small pack, big salty personality.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: cucumber tsukemono, takuan, shibazuke, hakusai pickles]

japanese_name: ローソン シーチキンマヨネーズおにぎり
description: Tuna mayo onigiri. Lawson's version is soft rice, tuna-mayo filling, and the commuter breakfast that costs less than a train delay.

japanese_name: ローソン シーチキンマヨネーズおにぎり
description: Tuna mayonnaise onigiri. Sea Chicken mayo inside hand-rolled rice and nori. The safe first konbini pick before you start getting weird.

english_name: UNIQLO UTme! Custom T-Shirt or Tote
japanese_name: ユニクロ UTme! カスタムTシャツ・トート
description: UNIQLO UTme! custom T-shirt or tote. Pick a blank, add art or text, and leave with souvenir merch you accidentally designed. Best used for jokes, inside bits, and bad decisions in good cotton.

japanese_name: 宇治抹茶
description: Uji matcha. Kyoto matcha powder for whisking, lattes, or pretending your kitchen is calmer than it is. Buy sealed tins, not random green dust.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Ippodo matcha, Marukyu Koyamaen matcha, Tsujiri matcha, supermarket Uji matcha]

japanese_name: 宇治抹茶スイーツ
description: Uji matcha sweets. Matcha cookies, cakes, and chocolate with Kyoto tea doing the heavy lifting. The flavor is earthy, bitter-sweet, and very good at pretending to be a grown-up gift.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: matcha langue de chat, matcha baum, matcha chocolate, Kyoto matcha cookies]

japanese_name: うまい棒 コーンポタージュ味
description: Umaibo. A cheap corn puff stick with cartoon chaos on the wrapper. Corn potage is the classic gateway flavor.

japanese_name: うまい棒 コーンポタージュ味 まとめ買い
description: Umaibo multipack. A bag of crunchy puff sticks for kids, offices, or snack goblins with no portion control. Cheap, light, and suitcase-friendly.

japanese_name: ローソン 紀州南高梅おにぎり
description: Ume onigiri. Pickled plum rice ball, sharp and salty in the best way. The konbini choice for people who want breakfast to slap them awake.

japanese_name: 梅干しギフトパック
description: Umeboshi gift pack. Pickled plums boxed like serious business. Salty, sour, and built for rice, tea, or relatives who do not want candy.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Kishu umeboshi, honey umeboshi, shiso umeboshi, assorted umeboshi gift box]
